verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Send down Your Glory Send down Your Glory Cleanse these hands that we raise In this temple filled with praise Send down Your Glory Send down Your Glory Our broken lives You can mend If You'll touch us once again Send down Your Glory

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We believe in Your Name That is why we came Hoping that You'd visit us this hour And in one accord we sing praises to You, Lord Hoping that You'd visit us this hour.
